label: About
title: About Nocturnal Marsh Memory Observatory
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 17 recent saved-signal files and 16 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around Image 1983-1998 (Skintone Edition), by Susumu Yokota and Inside America's Healthiest Yards: Edwina Von Gal's Iconic Hamptons Paradise (Garden Tour), plus 7 more. A source image from f4.bcbits.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Nocturnal Marsh Memory Observatory: Create a single finished still image of a nocturnal marsh observatory grown from rewilded garden intelligence and ambient memory. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against pale broken foreground slab, dark horizon tree mass, and mossy circular filament arc.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
